title: poa misera var. sphondylodes
intro: Poa misera var. sphondylodes, also known as the poor grass or grass of the poor, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Poa misera var. sphondylodes include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used as a poultice or applied topically to wounds and skin irritations.
